productName: Swifts Edibles - Gummies LIVE Resin-Peach Fuego-MAX-Hybrid-500mg - Peach - Regular - MAX THC:CBD:CBN:CBG - Hybrid - 60g
description: Small-batch soft, juicy peach gummies with a jewel-soft bite, slow-poured like artisan pâte de fruit and dusted with a delicate sugar sparkle for that perfect candy-shop finish. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBN to help you relax and ease into rest. A craveable infused treat that feels right at home next to the best sweets on the shelf.
